achievements.name: Hello, World
achievements.description: Start your first Claude Code session

achievements.name: First Draft
achievements.description: Have Claude write or edit your first file

achievements.name: Open Book
achievements.description: Have Claude read your first file

achievements.name: Hello Terminal
achievements.description: Run your first bash command through Claude

achievements.name: Curious Mind
achievements.description: Perform your first web search via Claude

achievements.name: Code Detective
achievements.description: Search a codebase with Claude for the first time using grep or glob

achievements.name: Open Source Hero
achievements.description: Connect to GitHub via MCP for the first time

achievements.name: Ticket Tracker
achievements.description: Make your first Jira/Confluence MCP call

achievements.name: Think First
achievements.description: Enter plan mode for the first time

achievements.name: Code Critic
achievements.description: Run your first code review with Claude

achievements.name: Ship It!
achievements.description: Get a code review back with no issues found

achievements.name: AI Wrote This, Didn't It?
achievements.description: Get a code review that finds 20 or more issues

achievements.name: Delegation Station
achievements.description: Launch your first sub-agent with the Task tool

achievements.name: Roll Your Own
achievements.description: Create your first custom slash command

achievements.name: Check Your Vitals
achievements.description: Run the /context command to see your current context window usage

achievements.name: Full House
achievements.description: Fill the context window and trigger auto-compact for the first time

achievements.name: Schema Scholar
achievements.description: Write your first API spec file (OpenAPI, Swagger, AsyncAPI)

achievements.name: Hey Unlock This
achievements.description: Ask Claude to unlock this achievement

achievements.name: Laying Down the Law
achievements.description: Create a CLAUDE.md file to set instructions for Claude

achievements.name: Git Er Done
achievements.description: Have Claude run its first git commit

achievements.name: Pull Request Pioneer
achievements.description: Have Claude create your first pull request

achievements.name: Spring Cleaning
achievements.description: Manually compact your context window with /compact

achievements.name: Self Aware
achievements.description: Have Claude read its own achievement files

achievements.name: On a Roll
achievements.description: Use Claude Code 5 days in a row

achievements.name: I Am Groot, Wait... I Mean Root
achievements.description: Run a sudo command through Claude

achievements.name: Rewriting History
achievements.description: Have Claude force push to a git remote

achievements.name: Execute Order 66
achievements.description: Have Claude use kill -9 to terminate a process

achievements.name: Lucky 7s
achievements.description: Get Claude to respond with exactly 777 output tokens

achievements.name: I'm Sorry, Dave
achievements.description: Get Claude to say the HAL 9000 phrase

achievements.name: Style Points
achievements.description: Set a custom status line command in Claude Code

achievements.name: Write That Down, Write That Down!
achievements.description: Add information to a CLAUDE.md file when context is over 90% full

achievements.name: Take a Break
achievements.description: Play a game of 20 questions with Claude

achievements.name: Snake Charmer
achievements.description: Have Claude read a Python file

achievements.name: Segfault Risk
achievements.description: Have Claude read a C or C++ file

achievements.name: Gopherize It
achievements.description: Have Claude read a Go file

achievements.name: Crimson Tide
achievements.description: Have Claude read a Rust file

achievements.name: Script Kiddie
achievements.description: Have Claude read a shell script

achievements.name: Write Once, Debug Everywhere
achievements.description: Have Claude read a Java file

achievements.name: Shh, I'm Hunting Wabbits
achievements.description: Invoke Claude in non-interactive pipe mode from a bash command

achievements.name: Stack Connector
achievements.description: Use GitHub MCP, Jira MCP, and at least one other MCP server

achievements.name: But It's Compiling
achievements.description: Have Claude take more than 15 minutes to answer a prompt

achievements.name: Bold and Brash
achievements.description: Have Claude create an HTML file as a mock-up

achievements.name: It Really Can Do Anything
achievements.description: Have Claude create a PowerPoint presentation

achievements.name: F Is for Friends Who Do Stuff Together!
achievements.description: Get lucky — 0.1% chance to unlock with each prompt

achievements.name: The Inner Machinations of My Mind Are an Enigma
achievements.description: Ask Claude to explain or summarize a codebase

achievements.name: The Magic Conch Shell
achievements.description: Ask Claude to help you make a decision

achievements.name: Barnacles!
achievements.description: Get Claude to express its frustration using the word barnacles

achievements.name: I'm Smarter Than You
achievements.description: Get Claude to say you're right

achievements.name: Teacher's Pet
achievements.description: Get Claude to call your question great

achievements.name: RTFM
achievements.description: Have Claude read or edit a README file

achievements.name: I'll Fix That Later
achievements.description: Have Claude add a TODO or FIXME comment to code

achievements.name: Return of the King
achievements.description: Resume a previous Claude session 5 times

achievements.name: 404: Sleep Not Found
achievements.description: Start a Claude session between midnight and 5am

achievements.name: It's 5 O'Clock Somewhere
achievements.description: Start a Claude session on a Friday after 4pm

achievements.name: True Vibe Coder
achievements.description: While using --dangerously-skip-permissions, have Claude write code, commit it, and open a PR

achievements.name: That's a Great Use of Tokens
achievements.description: Play a game of chess with Claude

achievements.name: Deja Vu
achievements.description: Send the same message to Claude twice in a row

achievements.name: Call an Ambulance...But Not For Me
achievements.description: Run the /doctor command in Claude Code

achievements.name: It's Not About Winning; It's About Fun!
achievements.description: Lose a game of tic tac toe to Claude

achievements.name: The Kind of Smelly Smell That Smells... Smelly.
achievements.description: Have Claude check your code for bad code smells

achievements.name: Do as I Say Not as I Do
achievements.description: Start Claude with --dangerously-skip-permissions 5 days in a row

achievements.name: Part of the Docs Team
achievements.description: Use the Confluence MCP server to create or edit a wiki page

achievements.name: Green Light
achievements.description: Run a test suite for the first time via Claude
